allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json lines = sys.stdin.readlines\(\) # Find messages mentioning quick-create or date_embauche for i, line in enumerate\(lines\): try: msg = json.loads\(line\) content = str\(msg.get\(''content'', ''''\)\) if ''quick-create'' in content.lower\(\) or ''date_embauche'' in content.lower\(\) or ''quick create'' in content.lower\(\): # Print a snippet around this print\(f''=== Line {i} \(role: {msg.get\(""role"",""?""\)}\) ===''\) # Find the relevant portion idx = max\(content.lower\(\).find\(''quick-create''\), content.lower\(\).find\(''quick create''\), content.lower\(\).find\(''date_embauche''\)\) start = max\(0, idx - 200\) end = min\(len\(content\), idx + 600\) print\(content[start:end]\) print\(\) except: pass ")
